name: GT-hyp
source: Theorem hypotheses (given data of thm-dilation-compatible, discharged at the conclusion; not a refs leaf). j:B(H)_sa->D_sa is a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding: ||j(x)||=||x|| (order-isometric), j(x∘y)=j(x)∘j(y) (Jordan homomorphism), j(I)=I (unital). C:D_sa->B(H)_sa is unital positive. Phi=Cj. F=jC extends to a UCP map D->D with ||F^2-F||_cb<=eta, eta<=eta_0<1/4. Construction: P=theta(2Phi-1), A=Im P, a•b=P(a∘b); Ftilde=theta(2F-1), B=Im Ftilde, X*Y=Ftilde(XY), symmetrized X∘⋆Y=(1/2)(X*Y+Y*X). (skip_noquote: hypothesis bundle, no refs locus.)
